zh.Sockburn,,Durham,England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆索可本
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Conyers於1280年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，他的父親John Conyers Lord Sockburn43歲，母親Scolastica Lady de Cotham30歲。他和Alicia de Faye至少有3個兒子。他去世於1323年在英國英格蘭達勒姆索可本享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Conyers was born in 1280, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Conyers Lord Sockburn, was 43 and his mother, Scolastica Lady de Cotham, was 30. He had at least 3 sons with Alicia de Faye. He died in 1323, in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Conyers est né en 1280, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Conyers Lord Sockburn, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Scolastica Lady de Cotham, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Alicia de Faye. Il est décédé en 1323, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Conyers 1280 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Conyers Lord Sockburn 43 und seine Mutter Scolastica Lady de Cotham 30. Er hatte mit Alicia de Faye mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1323 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Sockburn, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Conyers è nato il nel 1280 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Conyers Lord Sockburn, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Scolastica Lady de Cotham, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Alicia de Faye. Morì nel 1323, nel Sockburn, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.
